text.title: Giving and Receiving Feedback Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.code: { "direction": "giving", "situation": "In yesterday's customer demo, second half.", "behavior": "You interrupted the customer twice before they finished their use-case description.", "impact": "We missed two important context items and had to schedule a follow-up call.", "intent_inquiry": "What was happening for you that prompted those interruptions?", "candor_quadrant": "radical-candor" }

example.note: behavior is interpretation; missing situation, impact.

list.item: behavior field containing personality or interpretation.
candor_quadrant = 'radical-candor' without an honesty cross-check (rule reflection).
Missing intent_inquiry when impact is negative.
